A new chapter begins! 🚀 We’re excited to announce that KLS is now KCC, Korean Culture Club! This rebrand marks the start of a bigger journey as we embrace not just language but all aspects of Korean culture. We’re so happy to take this step forward and can’t wait for what the future holds. Here’s to new opportunities, exciting events, and unforgettable moments ahead!✨

#mmucyber
